items: Cristopher Sánchez held down San Diego for 7.0 innings, striking out 8 in Philadelphia's 3-2 win.
Chicago White Sox pitching combined to shut out Minnesota, 8-0.
San Francisco pitching combined to shut out Milwaukee, 1-0.
The Dodgers pitching combined to shut out Arizona, 7-0.
The Athletics edged Chicago Cubs, 5-4, in 10 innings.
